name: Backend Development
description: A guide to server-side technologies, databases, and APIs for building robust web applications.

body.raw: Learn how to build the logic and data management that powers web applications from behind the scenes. This roadmap covers languages, frameworks, databases, and architectural patterns.
body.html: Learn how to build the logic and data management that powers web applications from behind the scenes. This roadmap covers languages, frameworks, databases, and architectural patterns.
